title: geranium linearilobum subsp. transversale
intro: Geranium linearilobum subsp. transversale, also known as the Transverse-leaved Geranium, is a plant species within the Geraniaceae family. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Geranium linearilobum subsp. transversale include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reduce pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
